meta.title: Shaper: Data Shaper (minpause_60s)
description: Shaper: Data Shaper (minpause_60s) replays live-power input through the current shaper rather than solar-divert control.
Short minimum pause interval after stopping charge. This should allow quicker restarts.
Compare live power, smoothed live power, shaper maximum, available charge power, and actual charge power to see how the limiter reacts.
